But since Helene is lying, Sima's statement is false. So Sima is lying as well. Then Christie says Sima tells the truth. But Sima is lying, so Christie's statement is false. Therefore, Christie must be lying. Wait, but if Christie is lying, then her statement that Sima tells the truth is false. That makes sense because Sima was lying.
